auth.name: Full name
auth.emailTaken: This email is already in use
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again in an hour.
auth.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.emailVerifiedBanner: Email verified! You can now sign in.
auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
auth.verifyEmailSuccessDesc: Your account is now active. Please sign in to continue.
auth.verifyEmailExpired: This link has expired. Please sign up again to receive a new one.
auth.verifyEmailInvalid: This link is invalid or has already been used.

roleSelection.title: Choose a role
roleSelection.subtitle: Your account has multiple roles. Select how you want to continue.
roleSelection.LEASEHOLDER: Declare crops for your assigned fields

landing.subtitle: Map your fields, track leaseholders and crop history — all in one place, from any device.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need, in one place
landing.featuresSubtitle: Designed for Greek landowners who manage fields across multiple municipalities.
landing.f1Desc: Draw field boundaries on satellite imagery or paste EGSA87 coordinates from the land registry. Area calculated automatically.
landing.f2Desc: Record the crop planted on each field year by year. Full history at a glance, always up to date.
landing.f3Desc: Assign leaseholders, invite them by email, and let them declare their own crop for the year.
landing.f4Desc: Full fields report with satellite map snapshots — ready to print or share.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in under a minute with Google or email. Free.
landing.step2Desc: Draw on the map or import coordinates directly from the land registry.
landing.step3Desc: Record leaseholders, crops and generate PDF reports at any time.

e9Import.step1Desc: Upload the official E9 property declaration (Βεβαίωση Δηλωθείσας Περιουσιακής Κατάστασης) issued by the Greek Tax Office (AADE). The system will automatically extract all agricultural land parcels from Table 2 (ΠΙΝΑΚΑΣ 2).
e9Import.dropOrClick: Drop your PDF here or click to browse
e9Import.analyzingDesc: Extracting land parcels from Table 2. This takes a few seconds.
e9Import.step3Desc: Review the fields extracted from your E9. Uncheck any you don't want to import. You can edit field names.
e9Import.doneDesc: {count} fields have been added to your account. You can now draw polygons and assign leaseholders.
e9Import.doneSkipped: {count} fields were skipped because their ATAK already exists in your account.
e9Import.noFieldsFound: No agricultural fields (ΠΙΝΑΚΑΣ 2) found in this PDF.
e9Import.errorParsing: Could not read this PDF. Make sure it is an E9 declaration from AADE.

invite.sentDesc: An invitation email has been sent to {email}.
invite.title: You've been invited
invite.chooseMethod: Choose how you want to set up your account.
invite.signInFailed: Account created but sign-in failed — please log in manually.
invite.invalidToken: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
invite.alreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used.
invite.contactAdmin: Please contact your administrator for a new invitation.
